---
title: "Check CI"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}

library(survival)
library(ggplot2)
library(broom)
library(haven)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(MASS)
library(lubridate)
library(lme4)
library(glmmTMB)
library(ggplot2)

rm(list=ls())
```

Read null and association data

```{r}
truedta_null <- read_csv("~/Downloads/CodeReview_Alan/truedta_null_Final.csv")
truedta_ass <- read_csv("~/Downloads/CodeReview_Alan/truedta_ass_Final.csv")

truedta_null$term_births <- truedta_null$all_births - truedta_null$preterm_births
truedta_ass$term_births  <- truedta_ass$all_births - truedta_ass$preterm_births
```


Variance and Correlation of each scenario inside one experiment.

```{r}
##############general 

# --- Paths ---
base_path <- "~/Downloads/CodeReview_Alan/exp/exp_001/Results/"
scenario_names <- c(
  "nondiff_null", "diff_null_moreErr", "diff_null_lessErr", "diff_null_lessErr50", "diff_null_moreErr50", 
  "nondiff_harm", "diff_harm_moreErr", "diff_harm_lessErr", "diff_harm_lessErr50", "diff_harm_moreErr50"
)

# --- Error Levels ---
err.lev <- c(0, 0.5, 1, 2)

# --- True Variance ---
var_pm25 <- var(truedta_ass$pm25)

# --- Loop through each scenario ---
for (scen in scenario_names) {
  cat("\nProcessing scenario:", scen, "\n")
  
  # Load results
  diff_res <- read_csv(paste0(base_path, scen, ".csv"))
  cor_res  <- read_csv(paste0(base_path, "cor_", scen, ".csv"))
  
  # Variance of observed exposure for error levels
  variances_pm_err <- numeric(length(err.lev))
  for (e in 1:length(err.lev)) {
    pm.err.norisk <- rnorm(nrow(truedta_ass), truedta_ass$pm25, err.lev[e] * sd(truedta_ass$pm25))
    pm.err.hirisk <- rnorm(nrow(truedta_ass), truedta_ass$pm25, (err.lev[e] * 10) * sd(truedta_ass$pm25))
    
    pm.err <- ifelse(truedta_ass$all_births > 0,
                     (truedta_ass$term_births * pm.err.norisk +
                        truedta_ass$preterm_births * pm.err.hirisk) /
                       truedta_ass$all_births,
                     mean(c(pm.err.norisk, pm.err.hirisk)))
    
    variances_pm_err[e] <- var(pm.err)
  }
  
  # Output variance comparison
  variance_comparison <- data.frame(
    Error_Level = err.lev,
    Variance_pm25 = var_pm25,
    Variance_pm_err = variances_pm_err
  )
  print(variance_comparison)
  
  # Correlation plot
  correlations <- colMeans(cor_res)
  plot(err.lev, correlations, type = "b", col = "red",
       xlab = "Error Level", ylab = "Correlation (pm.err vs pm25)",
       main = paste("Correlation vs Error Levels (", scen, ")", sep = ""))
  
  # Coefficients and SEs
  coef_means <- colMeans(diff_res[, grep("b_", names(diff_res))])
  se_means   <- colMeans(diff_res[, grep("se_", names(diff_res))])
  
  # Plot coefficients and SEs
  par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
  
  plot(err.lev, coef_means, type = "b", col = "blue",
       xlab = "Error Level", ylab = "Mean Coefficient (b)",
       main = paste("Effect of Error on Coefficient (", scen, ")", sep = ""))
  
  plot(err.lev, se_means, type = "b", col = "green",
       xlab = "Error Level", ylab = "Mean SE",
       main = paste("Effect of Error on SE (", scen, ")", sep = ""))
  
  par(mfrow = c(1, 1))  # Reset plot layout
  
  cat("Completed scenario:", scen, "\n")
}

cat("\nAll scenarios processed!\n")


```


```{r}
# Initialize empty list to store results for all scenarios
all_results <- list()

for (scen in scenario_names) {
  cat("\nProcessing scenario:", scen, "\n")
  
  # Load results
  diff_res <- read_csv(paste0(base_path, scen, ".csv"))
  cor_res  <- read_csv(paste0(base_path, "cor_", scen, ".csv"))
  
  # Variance of observed exposure for error levels
  variances_pm_err <- numeric(length(err.lev))
  for (e in 1:length(err.lev)) {
    pm.err.norisk <- rnorm(nrow(truedta_ass), truedta_ass$pm25, err.lev[e] * sd(truedta_ass$pm25))
    pm.err.hirisk <- rnorm(nrow(truedta_ass), truedta_ass$pm25, (err.lev[e] * 10) * sd(truedta_ass$pm25))
    
    pm.err <- ifelse(truedta_ass$all_births > 0,
                     (truedta_ass$term_births * pm.err.norisk +
                        truedta_ass$preterm_births * pm.err.hirisk) /
                       truedta_ass$all_births,
                     mean(c(pm.err.norisk, pm.err.hirisk)))
    
    variances_pm_err[e] <- var(pm.err)
  }
  
  # Compute average correlation
  correlations <- colMeans(cor_res)
  
  # Combine into a data frame
  df <- data.frame(
    Scenario = scen,
    Error_Level = err.lev,
    Variance_pm25 = var_pm25,
    Variance_pm_err = variances_pm_err,
    Correlation_pm_err_pm25 = correlations
  )
  
  all_results[[scen]] <- df
}

# Combine all scenarios into one data frame
final_results <- do.call(rbind, all_results)
write_csv(final_results,"~/Downloads/CodeReview_Alan/exp/exp_001/Results/Var_Corr.csv")
```

```{r}
library(xtable)
# Create LaTeX table
xtable_table <- xtable(final_results, caption = "Variance and Correlation Results Across Scenarios", label = "tab:var_corr_results")
print(xtable_table, include.rownames = FALSE, booktabs = TRUE)
```
Experiment E2

```{r}
# --- Paths ---
base_path <- "~/Downloads/CodeReview_Alan/exp/exp_002/Results/"
scenario_names <- c(
  "nondiff_null", "diff_null_moreErr", "diff_null_lessErr", "diff_null_lessErr50", "diff_null_moreErr50", 
  "nondiff_harm", "diff_harm_moreErr", "diff_harm_lessErr", "diff_harm_lessErr50", "diff_harm_moreErr50"
)

# --- Error Levels ---
err.lev <- c(0, 0.5, 1, 2)

# --- True Variance ---
var_pm25 <- var(truedta_ass$pm25)

# --- Loop through each scenario ---
for (scen in scenario_names) {
  cat("\nProcessing scenario:", scen, "\n")
  
  # Load results
  diff_res <- read_csv(paste0(base_path, scen, ".csv"))
  cor_res  <- read_csv(paste0(base_path, "cor_", scen, ".csv"))
  
  # Variance of observed exposure for error levels
  variances_pm_err <- numeric(length(err.lev))
  for (e in 1:length(err.lev)) {
    pm.err.norisk <- rnorm(nrow(truedta_ass), truedta_ass$pm25, err.lev[e] * sd(truedta_ass$pm25))
    pm.err.hirisk <- rnorm(nrow(truedta_ass), truedta_ass$pm25, (err.lev[e] * 10) * sd(truedta_ass$pm25))
    
    pm.err <- ifelse(truedta_ass$all_births > 0,
                     (truedta_ass$term_births * pm.err.norisk +
                        truedta_ass$preterm_births * pm.err.hirisk) /
                       truedta_ass$all_births,
                     mean(c(pm.err.norisk, pm.err.hirisk)))
    
    variances_pm_err[e] <- var(pm.err)
  }
  
  # Output variance comparison
  variance_comparison <- data.frame(
    Error_Level = err.lev,
    Variance_pm25 = var_pm25,
    Variance_pm_err = variances_pm_err
  )
  print(variance_comparison)
  
  # Correlation plot
  correlations <- colMeans(cor_res)
  plot(err.lev, correlations, type = "b", col = "red",
       xlab = "Error Level", ylab = "Correlation (pm.err vs pm25)",
       main = paste("Correlation vs Error Levels (", scen, ")", sep = ""))
  
  # Coefficients and SEs
  coef_means <- colMeans(diff_res[, grep("b_", names(diff_res))])
  se_means   <- colMeans(diff_res[, grep("se_", names(diff_res))])
  
  # Plot coefficients and SEs
  par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
  
  plot(err.lev, coef_means, type = "b", col = "blue",
       xlab = "Error Level", ylab = "Mean Coefficient (b)",
       main = paste("Effect of Error on Coefficient (", scen, ")", sep = ""))
  
  plot(err.lev, se_means, type = "b", col = "green",
       xlab = "Error Level", ylab = "Mean SE",
       main = paste("Effect of Error on SE (", scen, ")", sep = ""))
  
  par(mfrow = c(1, 1))  # Reset plot layout
  
  cat("Completed scenario:", scen, "\n")
}

cat("\nAll scenarios processed!\n")
write_csv(final_results,"~/Downloads/CodeReview_Alan/exp/exp_002/Results/Var_Corr.csv")
```


```{r}
# Create LaTeX table
xtable_table <- xtable(final_results, caption = "Variance and Correlation Results Across Scenarios", label = "tab:var_corr_results")
print(xtable_table, include.rownames = FALSE, booktabs = TRUE)
```

Experiment E3
```{r}
# --- Paths ---
base_path <- "~/Downloads/CodeReview_Alan/exp/exp_003/Results/"
scenario_names <- c(
  "nondiff_null", "diff_null_moreErr", "diff_null_lessErr", "diff_null_lessErr50", "diff_null_moreErr50", 
  "nondiff_harm", "diff_harm_moreErr", "diff_harm_lessErr", "diff_harm_lessErr50", "diff_harm_moreErr50"
)

# --- Error Levels ---
err.lev <- c(0, 0.5, 1, 2)

# --- True Variance ---
var_pm25 <- var(truedta_ass$pm25)

# --- Loop through each scenario ---
for (scen in scenario_names) {
  cat("\nProcessing scenario:", scen, "\n")
  
  # Load results
  diff_res <- read_csv(paste0(base_path, scen, ".csv"))
  cor_res  <- read_csv(paste0(base_path, "cor_", scen, ".csv"))
  
  # Variance of observed exposure for error levels
  variances_pm_err <- numeric(length(err.lev))
  for (e in 1:length(err.lev)) {
    pm.err.norisk <- rnorm(nrow(truedta_ass), truedta_ass$pm25, err.lev[e] * sd(truedta_ass$pm25))
    pm.err.hirisk <- rnorm(nrow(truedta_ass), truedta_ass$pm25, (err.lev[e] * 10) * sd(truedta_ass$pm25))
    
    pm.err <- ifelse(truedta_ass$all_births > 0,
                     (truedta_ass$term_births * pm.err.norisk +
                        truedta_ass$preterm_births * pm.err.hirisk) /
                       truedta_ass$all_births,
                     mean(c(pm.err.norisk, pm.err.hirisk)))
    
    variances_pm_err[e] <- var(pm.err)
  }
  
  # Output variance comparison
  variance_comparison <- data.frame(
    Error_Level = err.lev,
    Variance_pm25 = var_pm25,
    Variance_pm_err = variances_pm_err
  )
  print(variance_comparison)
  
  # Correlation plot
  correlations <- colMeans(cor_res)
  plot(err.lev, correlations, type = "b", col = "red",
       xlab = "Error Level", ylab = "Correlation (pm.err vs pm25)",
       main = paste("Correlation vs Error Levels (", scen, ")", sep = ""))
  
  # Coefficients and SEs
  coef_means <- colMeans(diff_res[, grep("b_", names(diff_res))])
  se_means   <- colMeans(diff_res[, grep("se_", names(diff_res))])
  
  # Plot coefficients and SEs
  par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
  
  plot(err.lev, coef_means, type = "b", col = "blue",
       xlab = "Error Level", ylab = "Mean Coefficient (b)",
       main = paste("Effect of Error on Coefficient (", scen, ")", sep = ""))
  
  plot(err.lev, se_means, type = "b", col = "green",
       xlab = "Error Level", ylab = "Mean SE",
       main = paste("Effect of Error on SE (", scen, ")", sep = ""))
  
  par(mfrow = c(1, 1))  # Reset plot layout
  
  cat("Completed scenario:", scen, "\n")
}

cat("\nAll scenarios processed!\n")
write_csv(final_results,"~/Downloads/CodeReview_Alan/exp/exp_003/Results/Var_Corr.csv")
```


```{r}
# Create LaTeX table
xtable_table <- xtable(final_results, caption = "Variance and Correlation Results Across Scenarios", label = "tab:var_corr_results")
print(xtable_table, include.rownames = FALSE, booktabs = TRUE)
```



Table A3 
For tables, we need bias data from results
```{r}
#1. Parse the scenario column
bias_results <- read_csv("~/Downloads/CodeReview_Alan/exp/exp_001/Results//bias_results.csv")
table_data <- bias_results %>%
  
  # Split scenario into parts
  separate(
    scenario,
    into = c("type","effect","errtype","error_level"),
    sep = "_",
    fill = "right"
  ) %>%
  
  # Fix nondiff rows (they only have 3 parts)
  mutate(
    error_level = ifelse(type == "nondiff", errtype, error_level),
    errtype = ifelse(type == "nondiff", NA, errtype)
  ) %>%
  
  # Create labels
  mutate(
    Group = ifelse(effect == "null", "NULL", "HARMFUL"),
    Scenario = ifelse(
      type == "nondiff",
      paste(type, effect),
      paste(type, effect, errtype)
    ),
    `Error Level` = error_level
  ) %>%
  
  # Format bias + CI column
  mutate(
    `Bias 95% intervals` =
      sprintf("%.1f (%.1f, %.1f)", bias_mean, bias_2.5, bias_97.5),
    Coverage = round(coverage)
  ) %>%
  
  # Keep only needed columns
  dplyr::select(Group, Scenario, `Error Level`, `Bias 95% intervals`, Coverage)

# Recommended: enforce correct ordering of error levels
table_data$`Error Level` <- factor(
  table_data$`Error Level`,
  levels = c("0","0.5","1","2")
)

# Optional: order rows nicely
table_data <- table_data %>%
  arrange(Group, Scenario, `Error Level`)

# Export LaTeX table for Overleaf
latex_table <- kable(
  table_data,
  format = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  align = "llccc",
  col.names = c("Group","Scenario","Error Level",
                "Bias 95\\% intervals","Coverage")
) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = "hold_position")

cat(latex_table)
```




Table A4.  
For tables, we need bias data from results
```{r}
#1. Parse the scenario column
bias_results <- read_csv("~/Downloads/CodeReview_Alan/exp/exp_002/Results//bias_results.csv")
table_data <- bias_results %>%
  
  # Split scenario into parts
  separate(
    scenario,
    into = c("type","effect","errtype","error_level"),
    sep = "_",
    fill = "right"
  ) %>%
  
  # Fix nondiff rows (they only have 3 parts)
  mutate(
    error_level = ifelse(type == "nondiff", errtype, error_level),
    errtype = ifelse(type == "nondiff", NA, errtype)
  ) %>%
  
  # Create labels
  mutate(
    Group = ifelse(effect == "null", "NULL", "HARMFUL"),
    Scenario = ifelse(
      type == "nondiff",
      paste(type, effect),
      paste(type, effect, errtype)
    ),
    `Error Level` = error_level
  ) %>%
  
  # Format bias + CI column
  mutate(
    `Bias 95% intervals` =
      sprintf("%.1f (%.1f, %.1f)", bias_mean, bias_2.5, bias_97.5),
    Coverage = round(coverage)
  ) %>%
  
  # Keep only needed columns
  dplyr::select(Group, Scenario, `Error Level`, `Bias 95% intervals`, Coverage)

# Recommended: enforce correct ordering of error levels
table_data$`Error Level` <- factor(
  table_data$`Error Level`,
  levels = c("0","0+c","0.5+c","1+c","2+c")
)

# Optional: order rows nicely
table_data <- table_data %>%
  arrange(Group, Scenario, `Error Level`)

# Export LaTeX table for Overleaf
latex_table <- kable(
  table_data,
  format = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  align = "llccc",
  col.names = c("Group","Scenario","Error Level",
                "Bias 95\\% intervals","Coverage")
) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = "hold_position")

cat(latex_table)
```



Table A5
or tables, we need bias data from results
```{r}
#1. Parse the scenario column
bias_results <- read_csv("~/Downloads/CodeReview_Alan/exp/exp_003/Results/bias_results.csv")
table_data <- bias_results %>%
  
  # Split scenario into parts
  separate(
    scenario,
    into = c("type","effect","errtype","error_level"),
    sep = "_",
    fill = "right"
  ) %>%
  
  # Fix nondiff rows (they only have 3 parts)
  mutate(
    error_level = ifelse(type == "nondiff", errtype, error_level),
    errtype = ifelse(type == "nondiff", NA, errtype)
  ) %>%
  
  # Create labels
  mutate(
    Group = ifelse(effect == "null", "NULL", "HARMFUL"),
    Scenario = ifelse(
      type == "nondiff",
      paste(type, effect),
      paste(type, effect, errtype)
    ),
    `Error Level` = error_level
  ) %>%
  
  # Format bias + CI column
  mutate(
    `Bias 95% intervals` =
      sprintf("%.1f (%.1f, %.1f)", bias_mean, bias_2.5, bias_97.5),
    Coverage = round(coverage)
  ) %>%
  
  # Keep only needed columns
  dplyr::select(Group, Scenario, `Error Level`, `Bias 95% intervals`, Coverage)

# Recommended: enforce correct ordering of error levels
table_data$`Error Level` <- factor(
  table_data$`Error Level`,
  levels = c("0","0+c","0.5+c","1+c","2+c")
)

# Optional: order rows nicely
table_data <- table_data %>%
  arrange(Group, Scenario, `Error Level`)

# Export LaTeX table for Overleaf
latex_table <- kable(
  table_data,
  format = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  align = "llccc",
  col.names = c("Group","Scenario","Error Level",
                "Bias 95\\% intervals","Coverage")
) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = "hold_position")

cat(latex_table)
```
